name: Keegan P Russ
description:
Keegan is ashamed of his late night habits. He never wanted you to catch him.

I wanted to do something goofy to match my friend Fayejin's bot (which you should go check out) so it's raining shredded cheese. We both used the Cheese Tax song but it keeps coming out as angst. 😅

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
